description_long: This is a robust, horned helmet reminiscent of Viking or Norse warrior designs, featuring a rounded metallic dome with a slightly weathered bronze-brown finish. Two large, white, upward-curving horns are symmetrically mounted on either side, attached with circular metallic bases. The helmet is reinforced with dark metallic bands, including a central vertical band adorned with an intricate gold knotwork pattern. Protective cheek guards extend downward on both sides, constructed from the same dark metal as the bands. The interior is not visible, but the helmet appears hollow and designed to fit over a human head. The overall craftsmanship suggests a blend of decorative and functional elements, suitable for ceremonial or costume use.
description: A Viking-style helmet with a bronze dome, ornate gold band, and large white horns, featuring dark metal cheek guards.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face of the helmet, both horns, the gold knotwork band, and the cheek guards.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of one horn, the circular horn base, and the side cheek guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, both horns, and the continuation of the gold band.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the right horn, its base, and the cheek guard.
attribute_graphic_design: Gold knotwork pattern on the central vertical band; otherwise plain metallic and horn surfaces.
